watchdog_cards.explanation: Flags payoff imbalance where larger losses overwhelm smaller wins.
watchdog_cards.label: Loss Asymmetry

watchdog_cards.explanation: Tracks forced exits and weak favorable-capture patterns in recent closes.
watchdog_cards.label: Exit Stack

watchdog_cards.explanation: Shows otherwise-valid setups choked by size, margin, or position-cap pressure.
watchdog_cards.label: Small-Bot Sizing

watchdog_cards.explanation: Detects disagreement between scanner, readiness, runtime blockers, and gate state.
watchdog_cards.label: Signal Drift

watchdog_cards.explanation: Highlights unstable actionable/wait or signal-class oscillation.
watchdog_cards.label: State Flapping

watchdog_cards.explanation: Surfaces attribution gaps and known fee/funding drag when the data exists.
watchdog_cards.label: PnL Attribution
